title: 'No Kings' protests against Trump focus on war in Iran: 'The US is on the wrong side of history'
subhed: Millions turned out to protests across the US against the Trump administration, with the movement's epicenter located in the twin cities of Minneapolis-Saint Paul, after two Americans were killed by federal agents there in January.

title: Emmanuel Grégoire inaugurated mayor of Paris
Two more suspects arrested in foiled Paris bomb attack outside Bank of America
Anne Hidalgo's unwavering tenacity after 12 years as Paris mayor
subhed: After being elected to the Council of Paris in 2001, Hidalgo was immediately appointed as then-mayor Bertrand Delanoë's first deputy, before becoming mayor herself in 2014. Over her two terms in office, her determination, despite strong political opposition and legal obstacles, set her apart.

title: Iranians live under constant anxiety: 'When I close my eyes, I wonder if I will see the next day'
subhed: Bombings, repression and daily surveillance have thrust Iranians into a state of uncertainty. The fear that the end of the war might leave the regime intact looms large in people's minds.

title: In Nepal, popular former rapper Balendra Shah, 35, becomes prime minister
subhed: The former mayor of Kathmandu embodies the hope for major change in a country plagued by three decades of political instability, betrayal and widespread corruption.

title: Escaping Putin's Russia: A father and daughter persecuted over a drawing, now in exile in France
subhed: Alexei Moskalyov and his daughter, Maria, are symbolic victims of the Kremlin's repression. The father was jailed after posting an anti-war drawing his teenage daughter made at school. They have just arrived in France and are under humanitarian protection.

In Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, 'no one ventures outside anymore apart from rescue teams'
subhed: Like 42 other rescue workers since the war began on March 2, 16-year-old Joude Souleiman was killed by an Israeli drone strike in Nabatieh, the second-largest Shiite city in southern Lebanon, where only a few hundred people out of 75,000 residents remain.

title: The US and Israel are fighting different wars against the same foe
subhed: Donald Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu share many objectives. However, their respective public opinions and electoral interests may ultimately highlight significant differences between the two leaders.

title: The serial-poisoning mother and daughter inspired by 'Breaking Bad'
subhed: Castor beans, wolfsbane, antifreeze, rat poison: Carole D. and Amélie D. considered every possible method to poison the former's partner, Enrique B. The two women are set to stand trial before a criminal court in western France starting March 25.
